caption.full:
Ryan Coogler's The X-Files reboot pilot has wrapped filming.

The pilot for Ryan Coogler's reboot of The X-Files has finished production. Reports suggest the project may shift from a TV series to a feature film. Himesh Patel and Danielle Deadwyler will star as new FBI agents.

What are your hopes for this X-Files reboot?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#TheXFiles #TVNews #RyanCoogler #Hulu

youtube.title: Ryan Coogler's X-Files Reboot Pilot Wraps; Potential Movie Pivot
youtube.description:
Ryan Coogler's pilot for a reboot of The X-Files has wrapped filming, with a new report suggesting the project could pivot from a series to a movie. Himesh Patel and Danielle Deadwyler star as new lead FBI agents, playing characters not based on Mulder and Scully. Filming concluded in July.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/tv/ryan-coogler-s-the-x-files-reboot-sparks-movie-speculation-after-pilot/
